title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Infosys

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Infosys
jsonLd.description:
Infosys has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Indore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Infosys:
Infosys is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Infosys!
